title: strychnodaphne puberula var. angustata
intro: Strychnodaphne puberula var. angustata is a variety of the Strychnodaphne puberula plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Strychnodaphne puberula var. angustata are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
